name: Jack-o-Lantern Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Reduced Fat Oreo® Cookie Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare crust, combine cookie crumbs, margarine, and sugar in a mixing bowl. Press mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Pour Jello into a bowl. Add boiling water. Stir until dissolved, about 2 minutes.
3. Add ice cream to the Jello mixture. Stir until the ice cream is melted and the mix is smooth.
4. Place in refrigerator and chill until slightly thickened, about 10 minutes. Remove from the refrigerator and pour the mixture into the pie crust.
5. Put the pie back into the refrigerator to chill until firm, about 2 hours.
6. Take the pie out of the refrigerator and make a Jack-O-Lantern face on the pie using candy corn and licorice.
7. Decorate with whipped topping if desired.
